description: The four-bed en-suite room comes with a three-quarter-sized bed, modern en-suite, and stylish study area. There is also additional under-bed storage for extra peace of mind. 200 Cowgate is a contemporary student accommodation in Edinburgh providing a range of high-quality modern rooms situated in the heart of this vibrant, student-centric city. The purpose-designed student accommodation provides: • All-inclusive utility bills covering Gas, Electricity, Water and Council Tax • WiFi is available throughout the building • En-suite rooms have shared kitchens, dining and living spaces with under-bed storage in each room • Bike store • Laundry room • On-site management Location & Surrounding Area 200 Cowgate is one of the most central private accommodation blocks to Edinburgh University, being located between the Central campus (8 mins walk) and Holyrood campus (8 mins walk). 200 Cowgate is positioned within the heart of Edinburgh’s historical and world-famous Old Town. It is located just off the Royal Mile and is surrounded by many of Edinburgh’s leisure and amenity offerings, and is central to the vibrant nightlife that Edinburgh is renowned for, including Three Sisters, Whistle Binkies and Sneaky Pete’s. The building is also within easy access of both Edinburgh Railway Station (5 mins walk) and Edinburgh International Airport (40 min journey time).

Academic House is a contemporary, premium student accommodation with fantastic amenity space, including an amazing roof terrace, set within the heart of the leafy suburb of Herne Hill, making it the ideal location to live and study. With a variety of room options from stylish studios to en-suite bedrooms in cluster flats. Relax and enjoy the views on the roof terrace and catch up with friends in the spacious common area. Academic House, Herne Hill, provides everything students need to focus on their studies, meet like-minded people, share fun times and make the most of their time at university in a peaceful location close to Central London. The purpose-designed student accommodation provides: • Beautiful Roof Terrace • Communal ground-floor lounge • All-inclusive utility bills covering Electricity, Water and Council Tax • WiFi is available throughout the building • En-suite rooms have shared kitchens • Bike store • Laundry room • On-site management Location & Surrounding Area Herne Hill is generating a reputation as “a slice of the countryside in London”. The area is seen as “a bustling area with a vibrant market every weekend, and a village-y feel”. With numerous supermarkets, restaurants and bars all the way down to small independent book shops, the area itself will draw students who are both looking for modern but peaceful living whilst still being in the hub of London Zone 2. The beautiful Brockwell Park and Brockwell Lido are only a short 6-minute walk from Academic House; the park organises many fun fairs and festivals throughout the year. The O2 Academy Brixton is only 11 minutes away by train, perfect for those who enjoy live music, and the quirky art-house cinema and cafe-bar Clapham Picture House is just 20 minutes by public transport. The location of both Herne Hill and East Dulwich train stations, being so close to Academic House, allows for a very large catchment of University / College students across both sides of the river. With Central London only 11 minutes away by train, students can discover all the city has to offer whenever they wish. Grab tickets for all the biggest West End musicals, soak up tales of Britain’s past and present at historic landmarks and museums, explore the city’s numerous famous art galleries, or indulge and try a new cuisine at a pop-up restaurant.
